metadata.description: A CPU component. First-class entity form of the §26 component model — a parent carries the cpu rollup and MAY also contain Hardware.Processor entities. deviceClass distinguishes a physical socket from a virtual CPU presented to a guest.

deviceClass.description: Device realization (common-elements.md §7). physical = a socket/package; virtual = vCPU.

partitionMechanism.description: Only when deviceClass=partition: e.g. cpu-pinning / cpu-set carved from a parent.

location.description: Socket designation within the parent, e.g. CPU1 (Redfish Socket). Primary discriminator.

model.description: Processor model, e.g. AMD EPYC 7443P (Redfish Model).

relationships.description: The host this processor is installed in; parent carries the reconciled cpu rollup (§26).
For deviceClass=virtual, the guest the vCPU is presented to.

adopts.role: processor component vocabulary (cores, threads, architecture, speed, socket)
